description.value: Aura faint divination; CL 3rd; Slot neck; Price 4,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION Crafted from gold beaten into the image of a lanner falcon and suspended upon a gold chain, it’s the traditional badge of office for a Prince or Princessâ although they are often given as rewards to those who are particularly helpful or well-liked by the Prince or Princess. The wearer of a pendant of the souk gains a +5 competence bonus on Appraise checks. By holding the pendant to her brow, the wearer can gain the effects of an identify spell once per day. Finally, the pendant grows warm in the presence of illusions, granting a +2 insight bonus on saving throws made to disbelieve existing illusion effects. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, identify; Cost 2,000 gp
